exec wpry nested/plugin.php

cmp stdout out.golden
! stderr .

-- nested/plugin.php --
<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Full Plugin
Plugin URI: https://example.com/full-plugin
Description: A fully specified plugin.
Version: 2.0.0
Requires at least: 6.0
Requires PHP: 8.0
Author: Full Author
Author URI: https://example.com/author
License: GPL-2.0-or-later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html
Update URI: https://example.com/update
Text Domain: full-plugin
Domain Path: /lang
Requires Plugins: woocommerce, akismet
Network: true
*/

-- out.golden --
{"file":"plugin.php","plugin":{"name":"Full Plugin","uri":"https://example.com/full-plugin","description":"A fully specified plugin.","version":"2.0.0","requires_wp":"6.0","requires_php":"8.0","author":"Full Author","author_uri":"https://example.com/author","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","license_uri":"https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html","update_uri":"https://example.com/update","text_domain":"full-plugin","domain_path":"/lang","requires_plugins":"woocommerce, akismet","network":"true"}}
